Platform

Insurance and automation. Built into one platform.

Insured Commitments

Commitment savings with protection built around real usage movement.

  • Coverage for AWS, Azure, and Google Cloud commitments.
  • Cashback and credits when usage drops below covered levels.
  • Buyback protection that helps remove stranded commitment risk.

Autopilot

Automation that keeps savings aligned as your cloud footprint changes.

  • Automatic rebalancing based on usage changes.
  • Manual approval before major commitment decisions.
  • Pause and override controls when your team needs them.

FAQ

Decision-stage answers.

How does Usage.ai save us money on top of AWS?

Usage.ai finds commitment opportunities, automates ongoing adjustments, and adds insurance so you can capture discounts without owning the full downside risk.

What happens if our usage drops?

Insured Commitments are designed for that scenario. Depending on the coverage, cashback, credits, and buyback protection help reduce stranded commitment exposure.

What's the security model? Do you have access to our cloud?

Setup uses read-only access for analysis. Usage.ai does not need broad operational access to your workloads to generate savings recommendations.

How does pricing work? When do we pay you?

You only pay when Usage.ai saves you money, keeping fees aligned with realized savings rather than projected value.
